play.title: Play on KiX
play.meta.description: Browse and play branded mini-games. Earn rewards from your favourite cafes and merchants.
play.hero.title: Pick a game. Play. Win rewards.
play.hero.sub: All games are free. Earn energy by visiting merchants, then spend it on the games you love.
play.energy.label: Energy
play.streak.title: Daily streak
play.streak.days: {count, plural, =0 {No streak yet} one {1 day} other {# days}}
play.streak.next_milestone: {count, plural, one {1 day to next milestone} other {# days to next milestone}}
play.streak.longest: Longest: {count, plural, one {1 day} other {# days}}
play.streak.signin_prompt: Sign in to track your streak.
play.filters.title: Filters
play.filters.results: {count, plural, =0 {No games match} one {1 game} other {# games}}
play.card.plays_today: {count, plural, =0 {No plays yet today} one {1 play today} other {# plays today}}
play.card.plays_week: {count, plural, =0 {No plays this week} one {1 play this week} other {# plays this week}}
play.leaderboard.empty: No scores yet today. Be the first to play.
play.htp.title: How to play
play.htp.latte_art.objective: Pour milk into the espresso at the perfect moment to create latte art.
play.htp.latte_art.controls: Watch the indicator. Tap or press Space when it lines up with the green sweet spot.
play.htp.latte_art.scoring: Five rounds. The closer to the sweet spot centre, the higher the round score.
play.htp.bean_match.objective: Find all matching pairs of cards before time runs out.
play.htp.bean_match.controls: Click or tap a card to flip it. Use arrow keys and Enter for keyboard play.
play.htp.bean_match.scoring: Each pair earns 1,000 points plus time and efficiency bonuses.
play.htp.default.objective: Score as many points as possible before the game ends.
play.htp.default.controls: Use on-screen controls or your keyboard. Arrow keys move, Enter selects.
play.htp.default.scoring: Higher accuracy and faster completion earn more points.
play.rewards.title: My rewards
play.rewards.empty: No rewards yet. Play to win vouchers.
play.rewards.redeem_confirm_msg: Confirm you have already used "{code}" at the merchant. This cannot be undone.
play.toast.qr_cooldown: Come back later for more energy.
play.toast.qr_expired: QR expired. Ask staff for a fresh code.
play.error.no_brand.title: No brand specified
play.error.no_brand.msg: Access this page through a merchant QR code or branded link.
play.error.load.title: Could not load
play.error.load.msg: Please refresh the page or try again later.
